record.field: bank_cash.balance + temp_investments.balance + sales_rec.balance + other_rec.balance + inventory.balance + other_current_assets.balance

sales_rec_noncurrent.balance + other_rec_noncurrent.balance + inventory_noncurrent.balance + fixed_assets.balance + long_term_investments.balance + other_long_term_investments.balance + intangible_assets.balance + other_noncurrent_assets.balance
accounts_payable.balance + loans_payable.balance + payroll_liabilities.balance + tax_liabilities.balance + advances_from_customers.balance + dividends_payable.balance + other_liabilities.balance
Participación de terceros en sociedades controladas
Resultados sin asignar de años anteriores
Total del pasivo, participación de terceros y patrimonio neto
